headline: Lead Data Engineer | London
summary: I'm a lead data engineer with 9 years of experience building large-scale data platforms. I enjoy working at the intersection of data engineering and ML infrastructure.

experience.title: Lead Data Engineer
experience.description: Leading a team of 5 data engineers. Built and maintain the company's core data platform on GCP (BigQuery, Dataflow, Pub/Sub). Migrated legacy ETL pipelines to Apache Beam and dbt.

experience.title: Senior Data Engineer
experience.description: Spark-based data pipelines on AWS EMR. Airflow orchestration. Python and Scala.
